name: Windwitch - Snow Bell
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＷＷ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウィンド・ウィッチ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－スノウ・ベル
desc: If you control 2 or more WIND monsters, and no non-WIND monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. A WIND Synchro Monster that was Summoned using this card as Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
mnst_eff: If you control 2 or more WIND monsters, and no non-WIND monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. A WIND Synchro Monster that was Summoned using this card as Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.
eff: If you control 2 or more WIND monsters, and no non-WIND monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. A WIND Synchro Monster that was Summoned using this card as Synchro Material cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.

action: Applies effect when used as Synchro Material
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
